---
title: "Literate Coding with Quarto"
author: 
  - name: Lindsay Hayes
    url: https://lindsaynhayes.github.io
    affiliation: Department of Cell Biology, OUHSC
date: 2026-07-08
draft: false
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Pre-lecture activities

Before class, read the [pre-reading materials](/readings/index_R02.qmd).

# Lecture

## Learning objectives

::: callout-note
### Learning objectives

**At the end of class you will be able to:**

- Generate and navigate a quarto document
- Recognize and create various data types in R
- Identify an object from a function in R
:::

## Slides

- [Lecture 02: Literate Coding](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1s0s0KC_s9L-uzuz8bf6lOln0Wb591MyoKOxfw1VdQ4A/edit?usp=sharing)

- [In-Class Activity](/activities/classwork02/palmerpenguins_intro.qmd)

# Post-lecture Practice

## Summary

- **Quarto** is an open-source scientific and technical publishing system to create reproducible, production quality data analysis reports and much more.
- **Quarto documents** use a unified authoring framework to present narrative text alongside coding blocks and outcomes.
